title: alangium villosum var. tomentosum
intro: Alangium villosum var. tomentosum is a variant of the Alangium villosum plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Alangiaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin infections, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, boosting the immune system, and protecting against oxidative stress. Alangium villosum var. tomentosum is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
